audit_items.proof_trace: Line 785 clamps elapsedTime to auctionDuration before the multiplier formula runs. With elapsedTime in [0, auctionDuration] and floor-division in mulDiv, priceMultiplier >= endingPriceMultiplier holds exactly. Parameter validation in _setAssetParams (L647-656) enforces auctionDuration != 0 and startingPriceMultiplier >= endingPriceMultiplier, so no arithmetic underflow or division-by-zero path exists.
